holdings.infoBox: DYNF is an equity ETF with a total of 207 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.59%, Apple at 7.47%, Microsoft at 4.15%, Amazon.com at 3.85%, and JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 3.47%.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Equity Factor Rotation Active ETF (DYNF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively-managed fund of large- and mid-cap US stocks that uses five equity style factors. DYNF was launched on Mar 19, 2019 and is issued by BlackRock.
